# Foresight Nudge
<!-- Auto-generated by /cog-foresight -->
<!-- Last updated: 2026-04-14 -->

## Signal
Hot-memory drifting from reality after one session (fixed issues still listed as open). Aspen deadline 2026-04-18 and architect deployment design running in parallel. Majordomo memory contains only self-referential content — no personal/work/health domains exist.

## Insight
Majordomo is being optimized as a delivery platform before it has the data needed to do its actual job. The tool is being built, not used. Personal context (taxes due tomorrow, health, family) lives in ~/.siona/memory but is invisible here. Without that data, Majordomo is a code assistant, not a chief-of-staff.

## Suggested Action
Make the personal domain migration decision today — not Friday. At minimum, seed a `personal` domain from ~/.siona/memory/personal/ with hot-memory and action-items. The federal tax deadline is 2026-04-15. Deployment architecture can wait a week. That deadline cannot.
